tasks.subject: #29 resolvable_by schema + A4 awk rewrite
tasks.description: Add resolvable_by field to findings-item schema; rewrite A4 convergence awk to filter on resolvable_by == audit-stack AND non-terminal status; document intentional behavior change for research_question items; bump schema_version 2 -> 3. Convergence prose must be identical verbatim across findings-analyst.md (canonical), audit-stack/SKILL.md, and wave-engine.md.

acceptanceCriteria: resolvable_by present in both claim-keyed and question-keyed item shapes in findings-analyst.md
A4 awk filters on 'resolvable_by == audit-stack' AND status != terminal (not the dead fetch_source OR research_question filter)
Convergence prose identical across findings-analyst.md, audit-stack/SKILL.md, wave-engine.md
schema_version: 3 in findings-analyst.md frontmatter template
Carry-forward rule explicitly handles v2->v3 field promotion
plugin.json and marketplace.json both at 0.12.0-alpha.1
CHANGELOG has ## 0.12.0-alpha.1 entry with bullet format '- {type}({scope}): {description}. Closes #29.'
metadata.verifyCommand: test -f agents/findings-analyst.md && grep -q 'resolvable_by:' agents/findings-analyst.md && grep -q 'schema_version: 3' agents/findings-analyst.md && grep -q 'resolvable_by == "audit-stack"' skills/audit-stack/SKILL.md && grep -q 'resolvable_by: audit-stack' references/wave-engine.md && ! grep -qE 'action == .fetch_source.*action == .research_question' skills/audit-stack/SKILL.md && [ "$(jq -r '.version' .claude-plugin/plugin.json)" = "0.12.0-alpha.1" ] && [ "$(jq -r '.plugins[0].version' .claude-plugin/marketplace.json)" = "0.12.0-alpha.1" ] && grep -q '^## 0.12.0-alpha.1' CHANGELOG.md

tasks.subject: #23 extraction_hash helper script + W1b integration
tasks.description: Create scripts/compute-extraction-hash.sh (pipes stdin through sha256sum | awk '{print $1}' so output is exactly the 64-hex digest plus newline, no filename suffix); extend W1b in catalog-sources/SKILL.md to compute and inject extraction_hash per unique slug; remove hash_inputs from concept-identifier agent prose and the three worked examples; update article-synthesizer input description; update wave-engine.md W1 output field list. Script opens with set -euo pipefail; stderr errors prefixed COMPUTE_EXTRACTION_HASH:.

acceptanceCriteria: scripts/compute-extraction-hash.sh exists and is executable
Script emits exactly 64-hex-char sha256 digest (no sha256sum filename suffix)
agents/concept-identifier.md has zero hash_inputs occurrences
agents/article-synthesizer.md no longer says 'already computed'
catalog-sources/SKILL.md W1b invokes compute-extraction-hash.sh
wave-engine.md lists extraction_hash, not hash_inputs
plugin.json and marketplace.json at 0.12.0-alpha.2
CHANGELOG has ## 0.12.0-alpha.2 entry with bullet format
metadata.verifyCommand: test -x scripts/compute-extraction-hash.sh && echo -n 'test|slug' | scripts/compute-extraction-hash.sh | grep -qE '^[0-9a-f]{64}$' && ! grep -q 'hash_inputs' agents/concept-identifier.md && ! grep -q 'already computed' agents/article-synthesizer.md && grep -q 'compute-extraction-hash.sh' skills/catalog-sources/SKILL.md && grep -q 'extraction_hash' references/wave-engine.md && ! grep -q 'hash_inputs' references/wave-engine.md && [ "$(jq -r '.version' .claude-plugin/plugin.json)" = "0.12.0-alpha.2" ] && grep -q '^## 0.12.0-alpha.2' CHANGELOG.md

tasks.subject: #25 tag vocabulary declaration + halt-on-drift check
tasks.description: Create scripts/normalize-tags.sh (halts with TAG_DRIFT: on any article tag not in STACK.md allowed_tags); insert ## Tag Vocabulary section in templates/stack/STACK.md between Filing Rules and Frontmatter Convention; rewrite article-synthesizer tag-selection prose to require vocabulary-chosen tags with backward-compat warning for empty/absent list; wire normalize-tags.sh into catalog-sources/SKILL.md between Step 9 (W2b) and Step 10 (W3). Script opens with set -euo pipefail; stderr prefix TAG_DRIFT:. No auto-rewrite.

acceptanceCriteria: scripts/normalize-tags.sh exists, executable, halts TAG_DRIFT: on mismatch
templates/stack/STACK.md has ## Tag Vocabulary section with allowed_tags YAML block
## Tag Vocabulary appears between ## Filing Rules and ## Frontmatter Convention in order
article-synthesizer requires tags from allowed_tags with empty-list backward-compat warning
catalog-sources skill invokes normalize-tags.sh between W2b and W3
plugin.json and marketplace.json at 0.12.0-alpha.3
CHANGELOG has ## 0.12.0-alpha.3 entry
metadata.verifyCommand: test -x scripts/normalize-tags.sh && grep -q '^## Tag Vocabulary' templates/stack/STACK.md && grep -q 'allowed_tags' templates/stack/STACK.md && grep -q 'allowed_tags' agents/article-synthesizer.md && grep -q 'normalize-tags.sh' skills/catalog-sources/SKILL.md && awk '/^## Filing Rules/,/^## Tag Vocabulary/' templates/stack/STACK.md | grep -q '^## Tag Vocabulary' && [ "$(jq -r '.version' .claude-plugin/plugin.json)" = "0.12.0-alpha.3" ] && grep -q '^## 0.12.0-alpha.3' CHANGELOG.md

tasks.subject: #26 W1 batch math + batch-{id}-concepts.md output naming
tasks.description: Rewrite W1 dispatch math in catalog-sources/SKILL.md: compute SOURCES_PER_AGENT = ceil(N/5) capped at 10, N_AGENTS = ceil(N / SOURCES_PER_AGENT); below N_SOURCES < 10 dispatch one-per-source. Output files named batch-{batch_id}-concepts.md. Update concept-identifier prompt to accept N sources and write one merged file at that path. Update wave-engine.md waves table + W1 execution prose.

acceptanceCriteria: catalog-sources/SKILL.md contains SOURCES_PER_AGENT, N_AGENTS, BATCH_IDS variables in W1 block
Dispatch math handles N<10 as one-per-source and N>=10 with ceil(N/5) capped at 10
Gate loop iterates BATCH_IDS with path batch-{batch_id}-concepts.md
concept-identifier agent output path updated to batch-{batch_id}-concepts.md
wave-engine.md waves table and W1 prose reflect batch naming
plugin.json and marketplace.json at 0.12.0-alpha.4
CHANGELOG has ## 0.12.0-alpha.4 entry
metadata.verifyCommand: grep -q 'SOURCES_PER_AGENT' skills/catalog-sources/SKILL.md && grep -q 'BATCH_IDS' skills/catalog-sources/SKILL.md && grep -qE 'batch-.+-concepts\.md' skills/catalog-sources/SKILL.md && grep -qE 'batch-.+-concepts\.md' agents/concept-identifier.md && grep -qE 'batch-.+-concepts\.md' references/wave-engine.md && ! grep -qE '\{source-slug\}-concepts\.md' agents/concept-identifier.md && [ "$(jq -r '.version' .claude-plugin/plugin.json)" = "0.12.0-alpha.4" ] && grep -q '^## 0.12.0-alpha.4' CHANGELOG.md

tasks.subject: #30 validator-orchestrator wrapper (sharded A1)
tasks.description: Create agents/validator-orchestrator.md with frontmatter (name, tools: Task+Bash+Glob+Read, model: sonnet, description imperative matching existing agent convention). Body describes dispatch math mirroring #26 (ARTICLES_PER_AGENT capped 15), per-batch validator Task dispatches over shards, full sources dir passed to each, per-article assert-written gate, summary JSON return. Replace audit-stack/SKILL.md Step 4 inline validator dispatch with orchestrator dispatch. Update wave-engine.md A1 section. Independent of Task 4 batch-math changes — blockedBy reflects article-synthesizer.md serialization order only.

acceptanceCriteria: agents/validator-orchestrator.md exists with 4-field frontmatter (name, tools, model, description)
description is imperative (does NOT start with 'Use when...' — matches 4-of-5 existing agent convention)
tools line includes Task and Bash
ARTICLES_PER_AGENT and dispatch math present in orchestrator body
audit-stack Step 4 dispatches validator-orchestrator, not validator directly
Each per-batch validator explicitly receives full sources directory (noted in prompt)
wave-engine.md A1 section describes orchestrator wrapper
plugin.json and marketplace.json at 0.12.0-alpha.5
CHANGELOG has ## 0.12.0-alpha.5 entry
metadata.verifyCommand: test -f agents/validator-orchestrator.md && head -6 agents/validator-orchestrator.md | grep -q '^name: validator-orchestrator' && head -6 agents/validator-orchestrator.md | grep -qE '^tools:.*Task' && ! head -6 agents/validator-orchestrator.md | grep -q '^description: Use when' && grep -q 'validator-orchestrator' skills/audit-stack/SKILL.md && grep -q 'ARTICLES_PER_AGENT' agents/validator-orchestrator.md && grep -q 'validator-orchestrator' references/wave-engine.md && [ "$(jq -r '.version' .claude-plugin/plugin.json)" = "0.12.0-alpha.5" ] && grep -q '^## 0.12.0-alpha.5' CHANGELOG.md

tasks.subject: #27 concept-identifier-orchestrator wrapper + clean 0.12.0 release
tasks.description: Create agents/concept-identifier-orchestrator.md with frontmatter (tools: Task+Bash+Glob+Grep+Read+Write, model: sonnet, imperative description). Body describes #26 dispatch math + W1b dedup + compute-extraction-hash.sh invocation + W2 article-synthesizer dispatch + summary JSON write to $STACK/dev/extractions/_orchestrator-summary.json. Replace catalog-sources/SKILL.md Steps 6-8 with single orchestrator dispatch. Rewrite commit Step 12 to read counts via jq from the summary file instead of NEW_ARTICLE_SLUGS bash arrays. Update wave-engine.md W1+W1b+W2 execution prose. This is the final task — also bumps plugin.json and marketplace.json to clean 0.12.0 and adds the consolidated ## 0.12.0 CHANGELOG header above the alpha entries.

acceptanceCriteria: agents/concept-identifier-orchestrator.md exists with 4-field frontmatter
description is imperative (does NOT start with 'Use when...')
Tools list includes Task, Bash, and Write
catalog-sources Steps 6-8 replaced with orchestrator dispatch
Orchestrator writes _orchestrator-summary.json
Step 12 commit reads counts via jq with literal dot-key from summary file
No ${NEW_ARTICLE_SLUGS[@]} bash-array dereferences remain
Orchestrator prompt references compute-extraction-hash.sh and #26 batch math
plugin.json and marketplace.json at 0.12.0 (no -alpha suffix)
CHANGELOG has ## 0.12.0 — 2026-04-19 header with bullets for all 6 sub-issues
Alpha entries (alpha.1 through alpha.5) preserved below the release header
metadata.verifyCommand: test -f agents/concept-identifier-orchestrator.md && head -6 agents/concept-identifier-orchestrator.md | grep -q '^name: concept-identifier-orchestrator' && ! head -6 agents/concept-identifier-orchestrator.md | grep -q '^description: Use when' && grep -q 'concept-identifier-orchestrator' skills/catalog-sources/SKILL.md && grep -q '_orchestrator-summary.json' skills/catalog-sources/SKILL.md && grep -qE "jq -r ['\"]\\.n_articles_new['\"]" skills/catalog-sources/SKILL.md && ! grep -q 'NEW_ARTICLE_SLUGS\[@\]' skills/catalog-sources/SKILL.md && grep -q 'compute-extraction-hash.sh' agents/concept-identifier-orchestrator.md && [ "$(jq -r '.version' .claude-plugin/plugin.json)" = "0.12.0" ] && [ "$(jq -r '.plugins[0].version' .claude-plugin/marketplace.json)" = "0.12.0" ] && grep -q '^## 0.12.0 — 2026-04-19' CHANGELOG.md && grep -qE '^## 0.12.0-alpha\.[1-5]' CHANGELOG.md
